description_long: This is a four-door sedan with a dark blue, weathered exterior, showing signs of rust and wear on the hood, roof, and trunk. The car features a streamlined, modern body shape with slightly tinted windows and blacked-out wheels. The front grille is wide and horizontal, flanked by rectangular headlights, while the rear has simple, understated taillights and no visible badging. The side profile reveals four doors with subtle handles and a gently sloping roofline, giving the car a contemporary yet utilitarian appearance. The wheels are large, black, and multi-spoked, contributing to a sporty look. The overall condition suggests the vehicle has been exposed to the elements for some time, with visible patches of corrosion and faded paint.
description: A weathered, dark blue four-door sedan with black multi-spoke wheels, rust patches, and a modern, streamlined body.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide grille, rectangular headlights, and significant rust on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights four doors, black multi-spoke wheels, and a sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays simple taillights, a rusted trunk, and no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing four doors, black wheels, and weathered paint.
attribute_wheel_design: Black wheels with a multi-spoke design, each wheel featuring approximately 7-8 thick, evenly spaced spokes.
